heading: Judicial review
label: 570 Judicial review
text: Any agency action relating to establishing, assisting, or terminating a negotiated rulemaking committee under this subchapter shall not be subject to judicial review. Nothing in this section shall bar judicial review of a rule if such judicial review is otherwise provided by law. A rule which is the product of negotiated rulemaking and is subject to judicial review shall not be accorded any greater deference by a court than a rule which is the product of other rulemaking procedures.
notes: Amendments1992— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–354section 590 of this title
amendments: Amendments1992— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–354section 590 of this title
